context: =  extrinsic impression of the posteroinferior wall of antrum Intramural-extramucosal Lesion of Stomach √  sharply delineated marginal / contour defect √  stretched folds over intact mucosa √  acute angle at margins √  may ulcerate centrally √  may become pedunculated and acquire polypoid appearance over years
